mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT m.member_id FROM partner p JOIN member1 m ON m.member_id = p.member_id JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = m.member_id JOIN place pl ON pl.partner_id = p.partner_id JOIN room r ON r.place_id = pl.place_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN order_detail od ON od.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = od.order_id WHERE 1=1 AND o.status != 'CANCELED'
AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{settlementMonth}
AND (m.login_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m2.nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
GROUP BY m.member_id, TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') )

SELECT o.order_id, od.reservation_id, o.order_date, guest2.nickname AS guestNickname, o.total_amount, o.coupon_discount, o.point_discount, o.real_total_amount, NVL(cu.platform_discount_amount, 0) AS couponPlatformAmt, NVL(cu.partner_discount_amount, 0) AS couponPartnerAmt, p.commission_rate, ROUND(o.real_total_amount * p.commission_rate / 100) AS commissionAmount, (o.real_total_amount - ROUND(o.real_total_amount * p.commission_rate / 100) - NVL(cu.partner_discount_amount, 0)) AS partnerPayout, pay.status AS paymentStatus, o.status AS orderStatus, rv.status AS reservationStatus, rv.check_out_date AS checkOutDate
FROM orders o JOIN order_detail od ON od.order_id = o.order_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.reservation_id = od.reservation_id JOIN room r ON r.room_id = rv.room_id JOIN place pl ON pl.place_id = r.place_id JOIN partner p ON p.partner_id = pl.partner_id JOIN member1 guest ON guest.member_id = o.member_id JOIN member2 guest2 ON guest2.member_id = guest.member_id LEFT JOIN coupon_usage cu ON cu.order_id = o.order_id AND cu.partner_id = p.partner_id AND cu.place_id = pl.place_id AND cu.status != 'CANCELED' LEFT JOIN payment pay ON pay.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{settlementMonth} AND o.status != 'CANCELED' ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO partner_settlement ps USING ( SELECT #{partnerId} AS partner_id, #{settlementMonth} AS settlement_month, NVL(SUM(o.real_total_amount), 0) AS total_sales, NVL(SUM(ROUND(o.real_total_amount * p.commission_rate / 100, 0)), 0) AS commission_amount, NVL(SUM(o.real_total_amount) - SUM(ROUND(o.real_total_amount * p.commission_rate / 100, 0)) - SUM(NVL(cu.partner_discount_amount, 0)), 0) AS net_amount FROM partner p JOIN place pl ON pl.partner_id = p.partner_id JOIN room r ON r.place_id = pl.place_id JOIN reservation rv ON rv.room_id = r.room_id JOIN order_detail od ON od.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = od.order_id LEFT JOIN coupon_usage cu ON cu.order_id = o.order_id AND cu.partner_id = p.partner_id AND cu.place_id = pl.place_id AND cu.status != 'CANCELED' WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{settlementMonth} AND o.status != 'CANCELED' ) src ON (ps.partner_id = src.partner_id AND ps.settlement_month = src.settlement_month) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ps.status = 'done', ps.total_sales = src.total_sales, ps.commission_amount = src.commission_amount, ps.net_amount = src.net_amount WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (partner_settlement_id, partner_id, settlement_month, total_sales, commission_amount, net_amount, status) VALUES (partner_settlement_seq.NEXTVAL, src.partner_id, src.settlement_month, src.total_sales, src.commission_amount, src.net_amount, 'done')
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(rv.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') AS settlementMonth FROM reservation rv JOIN room r ON r.room_id = rv.room_id JOIN place pl ON pl.place_id = r.place_id JOIN partner p ON p.partner_id = pl.partner_id JOIN order_detail od ON od.reservation_id = rv.reservation_id JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = od.order_id WHERE o.status != 'CANCELED' ORDER BY settlementMonth DESC
